samples.xml_description:
Implement a Multiplying Accumulator for 32bit integer. Clock. Reset signal. Defined as 1 for reset and 0 for reset signal inactive. 32-bit input operand A. 32-bit input operand B. 32-bit output representing the accumulated result. Multiply and accumulate in one operation.

Uses a register to store the intermediate result of the multiplication and accumulation.

On each positive edge of the clock, if the reset signal is high, the register is cleared to zero.

Otherwise, the register is updated by adding the result of the multiplication of the inputs.
